styles.css: :host{display:block;width:100%;height:100%;overflow:hidden;background:#050915;color:#eef5ff;font-family:Inter,ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif}.sdui-app{position:fixed;inset:0;display:grid;grid-template-rows:minmax(0,1fr)auto;gap:6px;padding:6px;background:#081020}.sdui-stage{position:relative;min-width:0;min-height:0;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid rgba(161,188,236,.18);border-radius:16px;background:#071222}.sdui-stage-port,.sdui-stage canvas{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;display:block}.sdui-hud{position:absolute;z-index:3;left:10px;top:10px;display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;pointer-events:none}.sdui-chip,.sdui-pill{min-height:24px;padding:4px 8px;border:1px solid rgba(165,194,242,.16);border-radius:999px;background:rgba(5,10,19,.72);color:#b8cae9;font-size:10px;font-weight:850;white-space:nowrap}.sdui-chip.ok{color:#baffd7}.sdui-panel{position:absolute;z-index:8;top:10px;right:10px;width:min(380px,calc(100% - 20px));max-height:calc(100% - 82px);overflow:auto;padding:12px;display:grid;gap:9px;border:1px solid rgba(161,188,236,.18);border-radius:16px;background:rgba(9,16,30,.88)}.sdui-kicker{color:#7f93b9;font-size:10px;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:.09em;text-transform:uppercase}.sdui-title{display:block;font-size:18px;font-weight:900;line-height:1.15}.sdui-copy{color:#c5d3ec;font-size:12px;line-height:1.45}.sdui-section{display:grid;gap:4px;padding:8px;border:1px solid rgba(165,194,242,.12);border-radius:12px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.035)}.sdui-section-title{color:#8df0bd;font-size:10px;font-weight:900;text-transform:uppercase}.sdui-line{color:#d9e5f9;font-size:11px;line-height:1.4}.sdui-row,.sdui-segmented,.sdui-zoom{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center}.sdui-rail{padding:6px 8px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:auto auto minmax(0,1fr)auto auto;align-items:center;gap:8px;border:1px solid rgba(161,188,236,.18);border-radius:14px;background:rgba(9,16,30,.82)}.sdui-rail input[type=range]{width:100%;accent-color:#8df0bd}.sdui-rail-label{color:#c5d3ec;font-size:11px;font-weight:850;white-space:nowrap}.sdui-segmented{padding:2px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:12px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04)}button{font:inherit;color:inherit;min-width:30px;min-height:30px;border:1px solid transparent;border-radius:9px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);font-size:11px;font-weight:850;cursor:pointer}.sdui-segmented button[aria-selected=true],.sdui-primary{border-color:rgba(141,240,189,.35)!important;background:rgba(141,240,189,.11)!important;color:#caffdf}.sdui-toast{position:fixed;left:50%;bottom:62px;transform:translateX(-50%);padding:9px 13px;border-radius:999px;background:#0a1222;color:#e8f1ff;opacity:0}.sdui-toast.show{opacity:1}.sdui-machine{position:absolute;width:1px;height:1px;overflow:hidden;clip:rect(0 0 0 0);clip-path:inset(50%);white-space:nowrap}
